title: Super Mario Bros (NES)
description: The First Mario game (I Dont Know About Donkey Kong) And The most Popular On NES. As you Try To Get To Bowser And Save the Princess but You have to go to castle to castle In Order To Save her. And There Is Another Mario game that was made before this one, its just called Mario bros i have gameplay on it. (Link On Video) But Anyways, Super Mario Bros Is An Awesome game And Always will. GAME RATING 10 outa 10!
